requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions for Lighting — GSO / CISPR 15 (DGSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明 EMC 发射——GSO / CISPR 15（DGSM）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明 EMC 發射——GSO / CISPR 15（DGSM）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Oman market are expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility (radio disturbance / emission) requirements based on the GSO-adopted standard that corresponds to CISPR 15 (limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), enforced nationally through MOCIIP / DGSM as part of the conformity assessment for regulated electrical lighting products. The applicable scope covers conducted emissions on the mains terminals and radiated emissions over the lighting-equipment frequency ranges. Test evidence from a recognized laboratory, consistent with the GSO/CISPR 15 emission limits, forms part of the technical documentation submitted via the in-country importer. Smart / wireless luminaires fall additionally under TRA radio approval (see ledom-emc-02).
summary.zh: 在阿曼市场销售的 LED 灯具应满足基于 GSO 采纳的对应 CISPR 15 标准（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）的电磁兼容（无线电骚扰/发射）要求，并在国家层面由 MOCIIP / DGSM 作为受管制电气照明产品合格评定的一部分予以执行。适用范围涵盖电源端传导发射及照明设备频率范围内的辐射发射。来自认可实验室、符合 GSO/CISPR 15 发射限值的检测证据，构成经在地进口商提交的技术文件的一部分。智能/无线灯具还须符合 TRA 无线电核准（见 ledom-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 在阿曼市場銷售的 LED 燈具應滿足基於 GSO 採納的對應 CISPR 15 標準（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）的電磁兼容（無線電騷擾/發射）要求，並在國家層面由 MOCIIP / DGSM 作為受管制電氣照明產品合格評定的一部分予以執行。適用範圍涵蓋電源端傳導發射及照明設備頻率範圍內的輻射發射。來自認可實驗室、符合 GSO/CISPR 15 發射限值的檢測證據，構成經在地進口商提交的技術文件的一部分。智能/無線燈具還須符合 TRA 無線電核准（見 ledom-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: GSO-adopted CISPR 15 standard — radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (enforced in Oman via MOCIIP / DGSM)
DGSM conformity assessment requirements for regulated electrical lighting products

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification, which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories. Testing must be conducted at CNAS / CMA-accredited laboratories in China.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS / CMA 认可实验室进行。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS / CMA 認可實驗室進行。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both the GSO-adopted lighting EMC standard and CN GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized and a CN GB 17743 test report from an ILAC MRA-recognized (CNAS) laboratory can substantially reduce re-testing. The practical gaps are procedural rather than technical: (1) the conformity evidence must be submitted to MOCIIP / DGSM through an in-country importer under the Oman conformity scheme, not under China's CCC; (2) the recognized laboratory's report should fall within scope acceptable to DGSM / GSO; (3) the declared rated voltage condition for the test should reflect 240 V 50 Hz operation. CCC EMC reports prepared solely for the CN domestic scheme are not automatically accepted; confirm the laboratory accreditation scope and the GSO standard edition referenced.
gap.zh: GSO 采纳的照明 EMC 标准与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故发射限值基本协调，来自 ILAC MRA 认可（CNAS）实验室的中国 GB 17743 检测报告可大幅减少重新测试。实际差距主要为程序性而非技术性：（1）合格评定证据须按阿曼合格评定制度经在地进口商提交至 MOCIIP / DGSM，而非按中国 CCC；（2）认可实验室的报告应在 DGSM / GSO 可接受的范围内；（3）测试声明的额定电压条件应反映 240 V 50 Hz 运行。仅为中国国内制度准备的 CCC EMC 报告不会被自动接受；请确认实验室认可范围及所引用的 GSO 标准版本。
gap.zht: GSO 採納的照明 EMC 標準與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故發射限值基本協調，來自 ILAC MRA 認可（CNAS）實驗室的中國 GB 17743 檢測報告可大幅減少重新測試。實際差距主要為程序性而非技術性：（1）合格評定證據須按阿曼合格評定制度經在地進口商提交至 MOCIIP / DGSM，而非按中國 CCC；（2）認可實驗室的報告應在 DGSM / GSO 可接受的範圍內；（3）測試聲明的額定電壓條件應反映 240 V 50 Hz 運行。僅為中國國內制度準備的 CCC EMC 報告不會被自動接受；請確認實驗室認可範圍及所引用的 GSO 標準版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (in scope) — lighting EMC emission compliance per the GSO-adopted CISPR 15 standard required for conformity of regulated electrical lighting products in Oman, submitted via MOCIIP / DGSM through an in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman requires lighting EMC emission compliance based on the GSO-adopted CISPR 15 standard, enforced via MOCIIP / DGSM. Because both Oman (GSO/CISPR 15) and China (GB 17743) derive from CISPR 15, a CN test report from an ILAC MRA-recognized laboratory can reduce re-testing, but the evidence must be submitted under the Oman conformity scheme through an in-country importer, tested at the 240 V condition, and CCC alone does not satisfy the Oman pathway. Confirm laboratory scope and GSO edition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼要求基于 GSO 采纳的 CISPR 15 标准满足照明 EMC 发射合规，由 MOCIIP / DGSM 执行。由于阿曼（GSO/CISPR 15）与中国（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室的中国检测报告可减少重新测试，但证据须按阿曼合格评定制度经在地进口商提交、在 240 V 条件下测试，且仅有 CCC 不满足阿曼路径。请确认实验室范围与 GSO 版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼要求基於 GSO 採納的 CISPR 15 標準滿足照明 EMC 發射合規，由 MOCIIP / DGSM 執行。由於阿曼（GSO/CISPR 15）與中國（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室的中國檢測報告可減少重新測試，但證據須按阿曼合格評定制度經在地進口商提交、在 240 V 條件下測試，且僅有 CCC 不滿足阿曼路徑。請確認實驗室範圍與 GSO 版本。

requirement_topic.en: TRA Radio Type Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires (Oman)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线灯具的 TRA 无线电型号核准（阿曼）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線燈具的 TRA 無線電型號核准（阿曼）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee smart lighting) require type approval from the TRA (Telecommunications Regulatory Authority) of Oman before being imported, sold, or operated. The TRA regulates radio-equipment market access, spectrum use, and approval of telecommunications / radio devices in Oman. Approval typically requires submission of RF test reports (covering radio performance and the radio-frequency spectrum-use parameters) consistent with the GSO / international radio-equipment requirements recognized by the TRA, plus product and applicant documentation submitted via an in-country importer. This is in addition to the DGSM lighting safety and EMC conformity for the luminaire itself.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 智能照明）在阿曼进口、销售或使用前，须取得阿曼 TRA（电信监管局）的型号核准。TRA 监管阿曼的无线电设备市场准入、频谱使用及电信/无线电设备核准。核准通常要求提交无线电测试报告（涵盖无线电性能及射频频谱使用参数），符合 TRA 认可的 GSO/国际无线电设备要求，并经在地进口商提交产品及申请人文件。这是在灯具本身的 DGSM 照明安全与 EMC 合格评定之外的额外要求。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 智能照明）在阿曼進口、銷售或使用前，須取得阿曼 TRA（電信監管局）的型號核准。TRA 監管阿曼的無線電設備市場准入、頻譜使用及電信/無線電設備核准。核准通常要求提交無線電測試報告（涵蓋無線電性能及射頻頻譜使用參數），符合 TRA 認可的 GSO/國際無線電設備要求，並經在地進口商提交產品及申請人文件。這是在燈具本身的 DGSM 照明安全與 EMC 合格評定之外的額外要求。

standards_or_laws: TRA (Telecommunications Regulatory Authority, Oman) type-approval / radio-equipment market-access requirements
GSO / international radio-equipment requirements recognized by the TRA for wireless devices

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission, now under MIIT radio administration) type approval for the radio module, in addition to CCC for the luminaire. SRRC approval covers spectrum / RF parameters for the Chinese market. SRRC type approval is specific to the Chinese radio regime and is not recognized for the Oman TRA market-access pathway.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具除灯具的 CCC 外，还须为无线电模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会，现归 MIIT 无线电管理）型号核准。SRRC 核准覆盖面向中国市场的频谱/射频参数。SRRC 型号核准专属于中国无线电制度，不被阿曼 TRA 市场准入路径所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具除燈具的 CCC 外，還須為無線電模組取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會，現歸 MIIT 無線電管理）型號核准。SRRC 核准覆蓋面向中國市場的頻譜/射頻參數。SRRC 型號核准專屬於中國無線電制度，不被阿曼 TRA 市場准入路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless radio modules in China (MIIT radio administration)

gap.en: China's SRRC approval does not satisfy Oman's TRA type approval — they are separate national radio regimes. A smart LED luminaire that holds CCC + SRRC for China still requires a separate TRA type approval in Oman before import / sale / operation. Exporters must: (1) identify all radio interfaces in the product (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, etc.); (2) prepare RF test reports acceptable to the TRA, validating the spectrum-use parameters permitted in Oman; (3) apply for TRA type approval via an in-country importer; and (4) ensure the DGSM lighting safety / EMC conformity is also in place for the luminaire body. Note the radio test conditions and supply should reflect the Oman 240 V 50 Hz grid. Non-wireless (plain) LED luminaires do not require TRA approval.
gap.zh: 中国的 SRRC 核准不满足阿曼 TRA 型号核准——二者为独立的国家无线电制度。在中国持有 CCC + SRRC 的智能 LED 灯具，在阿曼进口/销售/使用前仍须单独取得 TRA 型号核准。出口商须：（1）识别产品中所有无线电接口（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 等）；（2）准备 TRA 可接受的无线电测试报告，验证阿曼允许的频谱使用参数；（3）经在地进口商申请 TRA 型号核准；并（4）确保灯具本体的 DGSM 照明安全/EMC 合格评定也已具备。注意无线电测试条件与供电应反映阿曼 240 V 50 Hz 电网。非无线（普通）LED 灯具无需 TRA 核准。
gap.zht: 中國的 SRRC 核准不滿足阿曼 TRA 型號核准——二者為獨立的國家無線電制度。在中國持有 CCC + SRRC 的智能 LED 燈具，在阿曼進口/銷售/使用前仍須單獨取得 TRA 型號核准。出口商須：（1）識別產品中所有無線電接口（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 等）；（2）準備 TRA 可接受的無線電測試報告，驗證阿曼允許的頻譜使用參數；（3）經在地進口商申請 TRA 型號核准；並（4）確保燈具本體的 DGSM 照明安全/EMC 合格評定也已具備。注意無線電測試條件與供電應反映阿曼 240 V 50 Hz 電網。非無線（普通）LED 燈具無需 TRA 核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (wireless products) — TRA type approval required before import / sale / operation of smart or wireless LED luminaires in Oman; not required for non-wireless luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (wireless products) — SRRC type approval required for wireless radio modules in China (in addition to CCC for the luminaire)

source.publisher: Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart / wireless LED luminaires require Oman TRA type approval before import, sale, or operation — a separate national radio regime that China's SRRC approval does not satisfy. Exporters must prepare TRA-acceptable RF test evidence and apply via an in-country importer, in addition to the luminaire's DGSM lighting safety and EMC conformity. Non-wireless luminaires are outside TRA scope. Validate RF and supply conditions for the Oman 240 V 50 Hz grid.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智能/无线 LED 灯具在阿曼进口、销售或使用前须取得 TRA 型号核准——这是独立的国家无线电制度，中国 SRRC 核准不能满足。出口商除灯具的 DGSM 照明安全与 EMC 合格评定外，还须准备 TRA 可接受的无线电测试证据，并经在地进口商申请。非无线灯具不在 TRA 范围内。请按阿曼 240 V 50 Hz 电网验证射频与供电条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智能/無線 LED 燈具在阿曼進口、銷售或使用前須取得 TRA 型號核准——這是獨立的國家無線電制度，中國 SRRC 核准不能滿足。出口商除燈具的 DGSM 照明安全與 EMC 合格評定外，還須準備 TRA 可接受的無線電測試證據，並經在地進口商申請。非無線燈具不在 TRA 範圍內。請按阿曼 240 V 50 Hz 電網驗證射頻與供電條件。
